intro: Between April 13 and 22, 2026, ZCyberNews tracked seven high-severity reports on advanced persistent threats. The activity prominently featured the threat actors CyberAv3ngers, Sapphire Sleet, and SideWinder. Their operations targeted a range of critical sectors, including cryptocurrency, government, energy, healthcare, and industrial systems. Geographically, the incidents showed a focus on Bangladesh, South Asia, Ukraine, and the United States, with several campaigns noted as having a global impact. The consistent high-severity rating across all documented cases underscores the significant risk posed by these coordinated and persistent cyber campaigns.
